sections.paragraph: f. silence, stillness, e.g. of the winds, a calm, Psa 107:29. קֹול דְּמָמָה a voice of silence, i.e. gentle, still, 1Ki 19:12, and so poet. by ἓν διὰ δυοῖν, Job 4:16, דְּמָמָה וָקֹול אֶשְׁמַע “I heard silence and a voice,” i.e. a gentle whispering voice; unless it be preferred to take it, “there was silence, and I heard a voice.” LXX. and Vulg. understand it “lenis aura.”
